calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kathy Ober appearing for executor. The executor has adequately addressed the objections raised by Ms. Massagli. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathy Ober (Counsel for Mireya Chairez); Norma Massagli (Objector); Carmen Espinoza (Interested Person).

The Court noted several procedural issues at the outset (filing of receipts for preliminary distribution, filing of original bank statements, errors in the proposed Order). After presentation by Ms. Ober and the expression of various concerns by Ms. Massagli, the Court continued the mater to November 20, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Ms. Ober is to correct the noted procedural issues and file a response concerning a possible debt owed to the estate.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Petition To Determine Identity Of Heirs
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kathy Ober appearing for and with Mireya Chairez, petitioner. No response from Mr. Espinoza. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Waiver Of Appointment Of Probate Referee
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kathy Ober appearing for petitioner. Norma Massagli, objector appearing in pro per. Court is dispensing with notice to Jose. Ms. Massagli states her objections. She is concerned that the value of the estate is diminishing. She wants a full accounting and to be given notice of any filing and counsel should obtain consents from all beneficiaries for the waiver. Court advises her to seek counsel. Ms. Ober will file an accounting and she will give notice to everyone that is entitled to receive notice. Matter submitted. Petition for waiver of appointment of probate referee is granted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
